user.title: Codex Assist
user.description: Set the default model and prompt. Setup will then show a Codex sign-in code for your ChatGPT/Codex account.

device.title: Sign in with Codex

reauth_confirm.title: Sign in with Codex again
reauth_confirm.description: Codex Assist needs a fresh ChatGPT/Codex sign-in. Continue to request a new device code.

error.authorization_pending: That code has not been approved yet. Finish signing in in your browser, wait a few seconds, then continue again.
error.device_code_auth_failed: Codex sign-in failed. Restart setup and try again.
error.device_code_request_failed: Could not request a Codex device code. Check network access from Home Assistant and try again.

init.title: Codex Assist options
init.description: Adjust text response settings first, then AI Task image defaults. Codex Assist uses Home Assistant's normal Assist LLM control tools and respects Home Assistant's exposed-entity settings.
